zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Richardson於1569年出生在英國諾福爾可哈德維其可時，他的父親William Richardson29歲，母親Agnes Daie24歲。他於1595年7月20日與Ursula Southwell結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1635年2月4日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Richardson于1569年出生在英国諾福爾可哈德維其可时，他的父亲William Richardson29岁，母亲Agnes Daie24岁。他于1595年7月20日与Ursula Southwell结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1635年2月4日在英国英格兰倫敦享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Richardson was born in 1569, in Hardwick, Norfolk, England, his father, William Richardson, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Daie, was 24. He married Ursula Southwell on 20 July 1595. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 4 February 1635, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Richardson est né en 1569, à Hardwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Richardson, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Daie, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Ursula Southwell le 20 juillet 1595. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 4 février 1635, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Richardson è nato il nel 1569 nel Hardwick, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, William Richardson, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Daie, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Ursula Southwell il 20 luglio 1595. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 4 febbraio 1635, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Richardson(이)가 1569년 영국 노르폴크 하르드윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Richardson(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Daie(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1595년 7월 20일 Ursula Southwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년 2월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.St Peter Mancroft, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: St Peter Mancroft, Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Richardson nasceu em 1569, em Hardwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Richardson, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Daie, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Ursula Southwell em 20 de julho de 1595. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1635, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Richardson родился в 1569 г. в местности хардвикк, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Richardson было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Daie, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Ursula Southwell 20 июля 1595 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 4 февраля 1635 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Richardson nació en 1569, en Hardwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Richardson, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes Daie, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Ursula Southwell el 20 de julio de 1595. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1635, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
